# truenas_iscsi_initiator (Data Source)

Provides information about an iSCSI authorized initiator group on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_iscsi_initiator" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "iscsi_initiator_list" {
  value = data.truenas_iscsi_initiator.example.initiators
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric initiator group ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) Comment for the initiator group.
- `initiators` (List of String) List of initiator IQNs allowed to connect.
